```{r cnv-display-table}
if (is.null(cnv) || nrow(cnv) == 0) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nNo copy number alterations detected in this sample.\n:::\n")
} else {
  cnv_display <- cnv |>
    mutate(
      cnv_type = case_when(
        grepl("amp", tolower(type %||% alteration %||% "")) ~ "Amplification",
        grepl("del", tolower(type %||% alteration %||% "")) ~ "Deletion",
        log2_ratio > 0  ~ "Amplification",
        log2_ratio < 0  ~ "Deletion",
        TRUE             ~ "Unknown"
      )
    ) |>
    select(
      Gene          = any_of(c("gene", "gene_symbol", "SYMBOL")),
      Type          = cnv_type,
      `Log2 Ratio`  = any_of(c("log2_ratio", "log2ratio", "log2")),
      `Copy Number` = any_of(c("copy_number", "cn", "copies"))
    ) |>
    arrange(Type, Gene)

  # Identify amplifications and deletions for color coding
  amp_rows <- which(cnv_display$Type == "Amplification")
  del_rows <- which(cnv_display$Type == "Deletion")

  gt_table <- cnv_display |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Copy Number Alterations**"),
      subtitle = md(glue("*{nrow(cnv_display)} alteration(s) detected*"))
    ) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = any_of(c("Log2 Ratio", "Copy Number"))) |>
    fmt_number(columns = any_of("Log2 Ratio"), decimals = 2) |>
    fmt_number(columns = any_of("Copy Number"), decimals = 1) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(70),
      table.font.size = px(13),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
      table.border.top.width = px(3)
    )

  # Red for amplifications

  if (length(amp_rows) > 0) {
    gt_table <- gt_table |>
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "#ffebee"),
          cell_text(color = "#c62828")
        ),
        locations = cells_body(rows = amp_rows, columns = Type)
      )
  }

  # Blue for deletions
  if (length(del_rows) > 0) {
    gt_table <- gt_table |>
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "#e3f2fd"),
          cell_text(color = "#1565c0")
        ),
        locations = cells_body(rows = del_rows, columns = Type)
      )
  }

  gt_table <- gt_table |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fafafa"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(cnv_display), by = 2))
    )

  gt_table
}
```
